info.description: One quiz outcome (e.g. 'Start with the Nervous System Decoder'). The 6 slug values are wired into the quiz logic — don't change them. Title, blurb, and CTA label ARE editable.

slug.description: Don't change — quiz logic looks results up by this slug.

title.description: Big result heading shown when visitor completes the quiz.

blurb.description: Body paragraph explaining the recommendation. 2-3 sentences typically.

cta_label.description: Button text below the blurb (e.g. 'Send me the free Decoder').
